hindi: जय ललिता त्रिपुर सुंदरी। दश महाविद्या में सुंदरी॥
english: Victory to Lalita Tripura Sundari; the most beautiful among the ten Mahavidyas
roman: Jai Lalita Tripura Sundari, Dash Mahavidya Mein Sundari

hindi: श्री चक्र में विराजत माता। सोलह कला सम्पन्न विधाता॥
english: Mother who dwells in the Shri Chakra; endowed with sixteen arts, the divine creator
roman: Shri Chakra Mein Virajat Mata, Solah Kala Sampann Vidhata

hindi: कामेश्वरी शिव की अर्धांगी। ललिता की महिमा अनंत संगी॥
english: Kameshwari, half-body of Shiva; the glory of Lalita is infinitely glorious
roman: Kameshwari Shiv Ki Ardhangini, Lalita Ki Mahima Anant Sangi

hindi: सहस्रनाम में महिमा गाई। देवी भागवत में पाई॥
english: Her glory is sung in the Sahasranama; found in the Devi Bhagavata
roman: Sahasranaam Mein Mahima Gai, Devi Bhagwat Mein Pai

hindi: कामाक्षी कांची में विराजे। मीनाक्षी मदुरई में राजे॥
english: Kamakshi resides in Kanchipuram; Meenakshi rules in Madurai
roman: Kamakshi Kanchi Mein Viraaje, Meenakshi Madurai Mein Raaje

hindi: ललिता चालीसा जो गावे। सौंदर्य और लक्ष्मी का वर पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Lalita Chalisa; receives the boon of beauty and Lakshmi
roman: Lalita Chalisa Jo Gaave, Saundarya Aur Lakshmi Ka Var Paave

hindi: जय जय ललिता त्रिपुर सुंदरी। शक्ति पीठों की महारानी॥
english: Victory to Lalita Tripura Sundari; queen of all Shakti Peethas
roman: Jai Jai Lalita Tripura Sundari, Shakti Pithon Ki Maharani
